purpose: Manage-links UI: per-row created/expiry legibility, usage-count copy, trashcan hard-delete with confirmation, expired-row styling that live-updates while the modal is open, and a translated empty state. Owns no data of its own — renders inviteLinkStorage state (architecture.md module map).

public_api.name: ManageInviteLinksModal
public_api.signature: export default function ManageInviteLinksModal(props: { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; groupId: string }): JSX.Element
public_api.description: The modal component. Loads links via loadInviteLinks(groupId) on open, renders one row per link (created time, relative/expiry time, usage count, trashcan with inline confirm), an empty-state string when the list is empty, and live-updates expired styling on a local 60s tick.

public_api.name: describeExpiry
public_api.signature: export function describeExpiry(now: number, effectiveExpiresAt: number): { expired: boolean; unit: 'minutes' | 'hours'; amount: number }
public_api.description: Pure, DOM-free classification of an already-resolved effective expiry timestamp into a { unit, amount } descriptor for the relative-time copy ("expires in N h/min" / "expired N h/min ago"). Performs no expiry-gating decision itself — the boolean gating decision for a row's styling comes from the imported isExpired, never recomputed here.

public_api.name: expiryDescriptorToCopy
public_api.signature: export function expiryDescriptorToCopy(copy: Copy['groups'], descriptor: ReturnType<typeof describeExpiry>): string
public_api.description: Maps a descriptor to the matching Copy function call (manageLinksExpiresInHours/Minutes or manageLinksExpiredHoursAgo/MinutesAgo).

public_api.name: resolveEffectiveExpiresAt
public_api.description: Display-only mirror of inviteLinkStorage's isExpired fallback (link.expiresAt ?? link.createdAt + DAY_MS), needed because isExpired returns only a boolean and the relative-time display needs the actual timestamp. Imports the shared DAY_MS constant from inviteLinkStorage so the interval length has one source of truth; does not reimplement the gating DECISION (that stays on the imported isExpired).

public_api.name: formatCreatedAt
public_api.description: Locale date-time string (toLocaleString) for a row's creation timestamp — satisfies AC-UI-1's time-of-day-precision requirement for the created side of the row.

public_api.name: rowStyleFor
public_api.signature: export function rowStyleFor(expired: boolean): { opacity?: number; textDecoration?: string }
public_api.description: Pure mapping from the expired boolean to the row's distinct visual-treatment style props (AC-UI-3).

dependencies_allowed: inviteLinkStorage (isExpired, deleteInviteLink, loadInviteLinks, DAY_MS, InviteLink type) — consumed only, never reimplemented
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/lib/marmot/inviteExpirySweep.ts (notifications module — AC-UI-8's tick is a local interval, not a shared sweep import)
